name: 175ct Christmas Warm White LED Icicle Lights with White Wire and Spool - Wondershop™
description:
Elevate your party or everyday holiday decor with the 105-Count Warm White LED Icicle Lights with White Wire from Wondershop™. This set includes 175 lights that hang down from the main wire to mimic the look of icicles. The lights are warm white and LED, and are suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Add these lights to windows or walls, or hang on the porch to illuminate your home with holiday cheer.

Wondershop™: Welcome to the Wondershop.
